values.title: Welcome to The Signal
values.hero_subtitle: Conversations at the Frontier of Technology and Society
values.hero_description: Every week, hosts Mira Patel and Jordan Hayes sit down with the thinkers, builders, and leaders shaping our technological future. Deep conversations, no jargon, real insight.
values.cta_description: Get access to exclusive bonus episodes, ad-free listening, full transcripts, and early access to new episodes every week.
subscription_features: Early access - new episodes 48 hours before public release

values.title: The Future of Work After AI
values.body:
What happens to the labor market when AI can do 80% of knowledge work tasks? We sit down with economist Dr. Sarah Kessler to discuss the research, the reality, and the opportunities that emerge when technology transforms work at unprecedented scale.

Topics Covered

  • How AI adoption is actually playing out in enterprises
  • Which jobs are being augmented vs. replaced
  • The emerging "AI-native" job categories
  • Why the transition may be faster and smoother than feared
  • Policy responses and universal basic income experiments

Key Takeaway

Dr. Kessler argues that the real disruption isn't job elimination but job transformation. The workers who thrive will be those who learn to collaborate with AI tools, not compete against them.

image.alt: AI and future of work concept illustration

values.title: Climate Tech's Trillion Dollar Moment
values.body:
Venture capitalist and climate tech investor Ravi Gupta breaks down why climate technology is entering its most exciting era. From fusion energy breakthroughs to carbon capture at scale, the sector is attracting unprecedented capital and talent.

Discussion Points

  • Why 2026 is a turning point for climate tech investment
  • The fusion energy companies to watch
  • Direct air capture: costs, scaling, and the road ahead
  • How policy incentives are reshaping the investment landscape
  • The role of AI in accelerating climate solutions

Key Insight

Gupta estimates that climate tech will become the largest venture category by 2028, surpassing even AI. The two sectors are deeply interlinked, with AI enabling faster materials discovery, grid optimization, and carbon accounting.

values.title: Deep Dive: The Open Source AI Battle
values.body:
In this deep dive episode, Mira and Jordan unpack the escalating tension between open source and proprietary AI models. Who's winning, what's at stake, and why the outcome matters for everyone -- not just developers.

Analysis

  • The philosophical divide between open and closed AI development
  • How open source models are closing the performance gap
  • Security and safety implications of open weights models
  • The business models sustaining open source AI
  • Government positions and regulatory implications

image.alt: Open source code on a screen

values.title: Bonus: February AMA with Mira & Jordan
values.body:
In this subscriber-exclusive episode, Mira and Jordan answer listener questions on everything from their favorite tech predictions to behind-the-scenes stories from recent interviews.

Questions Answered

  • What's your most contrarian tech take?
  • Which episode guest changed your mind about something?
  • How do you prepare for interviews?
  • What tech are you most excited about in 2026?
  • Book recommendations for understanding AI

values.title: Mira Patel
values.body:
Mira is the co-host and co-creator of The Signal. A former technology correspondent for The New York Times, she spent eight years covering Silicon Valley before launching the podcast in 2021. Her interviewing style is direct, deeply researched, and unafraid to challenge conventional wisdom.

Mira holds a degree in Computer Science from Stanford and a Master's in Journalism from Columbia, giving her a unique ability to translate complex technical concepts for a broad audience.

When she's not behind the microphone, Mira advises early-stage startups on communications strategy and speaks at technology conferences worldwide.

values.title: Jordan Hayes
values.body:
Jordan is the co-host and co-creator of The Signal. Before podcasting, he was a product manager at Google and then a partner at a venture capital firm, giving him firsthand experience on both the building and investing sides of technology.

Jordan brings the business and investment perspective to The Signal's conversations, complementing Mira's journalistic rigor with practical insight into how companies actually build, scale, and compete.

He is the author of Building the Future (2024), a book on how technology startups can create lasting impact, and serves on the advisory board of several AI companies.

values.title: Anna Liu
values.body:
Anna is The Signal's producer and occasional guest host, stepping in for special episodes and series. With a background in audio production at NPR and Gimlet Media, Anna is the creative force behind the show's distinctive sound design and editorial quality.

She oversees all production aspects of the podcast, from guest research and pre-interviews to audio engineering and distribution. Under her production leadership, The Signal has grown from 500 downloads per episode to over 50,000.

values.title: About The Signal
values.body:
The Signal is a weekly podcast exploring the intersection of technology, business, and society. Since launching in 2021, we've published over 240 episodes featuring conversations with leading technologists, entrepreneurs, policymakers, and thinkers.

Our Approach

We believe the best conversations happen when smart people have enough time to go deep. Our episodes typically run 45-75 minutes, giving guests the space to explore ideas thoroughly rather than reducing complex topics to soundbites.

Where to Listen

  • Apple Podcasts
  • Spotify
  • Google Podcasts
  • YouTube
  • RSS Feed

Advertising & Sponsorship

The Signal partners with a select number of sponsors whose products and values align with our audience. For sponsorship inquiries, email ads@thesignalpodcast.com.

values.title: Subscribe to The Signal Premium
values.body:
Why Go Premium?

The Signal Premium gives you the full podcast experience with exclusive content, no ads, and a direct connection to our community.

What You Get
